title: Create Blinkt Mobile app clone

requirements.text: Create a news feed interface displaying article cards with headlines, source information, publication time, and thumbnail images in a scrollable vertical list
acceptanceCriteria: Articles display in a vertically scrollable feed
Each card shows headline, source name, time ago, and thumbnail
Feed supports infinite scroll or pagination

requirements.text: Implement backend data model for news articles including fields for title, source, publication timestamp, content snippet, thumbnail URL, and article URL
acceptanceCriteria: Article type includes all required fields
Backend can store and retrieve articles
Articles are returned in reverse chronological order

requirements.text: Create category navigation allowing users to filter news by topics such as Technology, Business, Sports, Entertainment, and General news
acceptanceCriteria: Category tabs or buttons are visible in the UI
Selecting a category filters the news feed
Backend supports querying articles by category

requirements.text: Implement article detail view that displays full article content, source attribution, publication date, and allows users to open the original article link
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping an article card navigates to detail view
Detail view shows full content and metadata
External link button opens article in new tab

requirements.text: Add user bookmarking functionality allowing users to save articles for later reading with a dedicated bookmarks section
acceptanceCriteria: Users can bookmark articles from feed and detail views
Bookmarked articles persist across sessions
Dedicated bookmarks view shows all saved articles
Users can remove bookmarks

requirements.text: Implement search functionality enabling users to search articles by keywords in titles and content
acceptanceCriteria: Search input is accessible from main navigation
Search returns relevant articles matching query
Search results display in same card format as feed

requirements.text: Create a modern mobile-optimized news reader interface with a clean, minimalist design featuring bold typography, comfortable spacing, smooth transitions, and a cohesive color scheme that prioritizes readability and content focus
acceptanceCriteria: Design works well on mobile viewport sizes
Typography is clear and readable
Layout emphasizes content over chrome
Consistent visual language across all views

constraints: Use single-actor Motoko architecture for backend
Frontend must use React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
nonGoals: Real-time push notifications for breaking news
Commenting or social features between users

required: Modern minimalist app logo icon for news reader (blinkt-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Placeholder thumbnail for articles without images showing abstract news iconography (article-placeholder.dim_400x300.png)
